case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. OSCAR ALEJANDRO ARRONA MENDOZA

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $865.21 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, OSCAR ALEJANDRO ARRONA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OSCAR ALEJANDRO ARRONA MENDOZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, OSCAR ALEJANDRO ARRONA $865.21 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
